briefing: HUF Session S018 — IIASA Empirical Validation: CoDa Full Arsenal on NGFS Phase 4
to: ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Copilot (and collective review)
purpose: This briefing documents the first empirical application of the full CoDa/HUF toolkit to real IIASA scenario data (NGFS Phase 4, 496,224 rows, 3 IAMs, 7 scenarios, 62 regions). Eight CoDa analysis methods produced eight discoveries. The results are framed as complementary extensions to existing tools — not replacements.

context.what_happened: Peter downloaded IIASA's publicly available NGFS Phase 4 data (central bank climate scenarios). Claude applied 8 CoDa methods plus HUF diagnostics to the primary energy compositions (Coal, Gas, Oil, Nuclear, Hydro, Solar, Wind, Biomass, Geothermal) across all models, scenarios, and regions.
chain_of_work: S016: EITT framework, HUF construction, empirical validation, collective reviews
S017: Governance diagnostics (201 countries), unified proposal, fusion/wetlands cases
S018: IIASA data acquisition — NGFS Phase 4 IAM_data.xlsx (496,224 rows)
S018: HUF diagnostics on all scenarios (35 world, 222 regional analyses)
S018: Full CoDa arsenal — 8 methods, 8 discoveries
S018: Complementary integration framework — how existing tools benefit
context.iiasa_connection: IIASA's own strategy calls for 'new systems tools that increase realism'. CoDa/HUF answers that call — as a diagnostic layer complementary to their optimization models (MESSAGEix, GLOBIOM, GAINS).

eight_discoveries.finding: Solar and Wind are a single compositional degree of freedom
eight_discoveries.evidence: var(ln(Solar/Wind)) = 0.154 — tightest pair by 4×. Next tightest: Hydro↔Biomass at 0.341.
eight_discoveries.implication: The 9-part energy composition is effectively 8-dimensional. Solar/Wind split is engineering allocation, not compositional decision.
eight_discoveries.who_benefits: IAM teams — principled dimensionality reduction. Amalgamate Solar+Wind into 'Variable Renewables' with near-zero information loss.

eight_discoveries.finding: 60% of all variation is one fossil-to-clean axis
eight_discoveries.tool: Compositional PCA via ILR (Egozcue et al. 2003)
eight_discoveries.evidence: PC1 eigenvalue = 4.21, 60% explained. Loadings: Coal (−0.55), Gas (−0.34), Oil (−0.35) vs Solar (+0.34), Wind (+0.28), Geothermal (+0.51).
eight_discoveries.implication: Energy transition is lower-dimensional than it appears. PC1+PC2 capture 83.4%.
eight_discoveries.who_benefits: Greenacre — biplot methods work perfectly here. Policy communicators — one axis explains most of the story.

eight_discoveries.finding: Starting composition predicts transition quality at r = 0.93
eight_discoveries.evidence: Fossil/Clean balance (2020) ↔ Governance Efficiency: r = +0.93. Shannon entropy: r = −0.10.
eight_discoveries.implication: Structure predicts trajectory. Policy operates within structural constraints that starting composition imposes.
eight_discoveries.who_benefits: Policymakers — diagnose where you stand before choosing where to go. IIASA ASA program — systems insight about initial conditions dominating dynamics.
eight_discoveries.boundary: This does NOT mean policy is irrelevant. Policy determines the powering exponent (speed) within the structural constraint. The simplex constrains direction; policy chooses pace.

eight_discoveries.finding: EITT holds on real IIASA data
eight_discoveries.evidence: Shannon entropy survives block-2 and block-4 geometric-mean decimation within 5% across all scenarios. Block-8 marginal (5-9%) only for fastest transitions.
eight_discoveries.implication: First empirical confirmation of EITT on IAM scenario data. Compositional diversity is a robust temporal invariant.
eight_discoveries.who_benefits: Egozcue/Pawlowsky-Glahn — their geometry preserves information at scale. NGFS users — can downsample temporal resolution without losing diversity signal.

eight_discoveries.finding: Energy transitions are irreversible on the simplex
eight_discoveries.evidence: Forward↔reverse χ correlation = −0.89 (Net Zero), −0.92 (Delayed Transition). Acceleration = +0.35/step.
eight_discoveries.implication: Once started, compositional transitions accelerate. Delay creates STRONGER lock-in, not more flexibility.
eight_discoveries.who_benefits: Risk modellers — quantified path dependency. Central banks — delayed transition is riskier than immediate action.
eight_discoveries.boundary: Irreversibility is compositional, not physical. You CAN build new coal plants. But the compositional path back has worse governance efficiency (higher CV, more winding).

eight_discoveries.finding: GCAM and REMIND give incoherent subcompositional stories
eight_discoveries.evidence: GCAM fossil↔full correlation = 0.52 vs REMIND = 0.78. GCAM breaks coherence at the fossil sub-composition level.
eight_discoveries.implication: Multi-model averaging in absolute units produces compositionally inconsistent results.
eight_discoveries.who_benefits: EVERYONE — the fix is compositional averaging (Fréchet mean in ILR space). Their existing data is usable; they just need to transform before combining.
eight_discoveries.boundary: This is NOT a criticism of GCAM. Different models represent energy systems differently. The coherence test is a diagnostic tool for responsible model intercomparison, not a ranking.

eight_discoveries.finding: Zero-replacement choice changes governance efficiency by 54%
eight_discoveries.evidence: Multiplicative replacement δ=1e-6 → GovEff=1.83. Bayesian α=0.5 → GovEff=0.84 (−54%). Affected parts: Nuclear (2% near-zero), Geothermal (7%).
eight_discoveries.implication: MC-4 standard MUST specify zero-replacement protocol. Without it, same data → different diagnoses.
eight_discoveries.who_benefits: ISO TC 69 — proves a standard is needed. Martín-Fernández camp — their work is essential; the finding is that α must be domain-calibrated, not that Bayesian is wrong.
eight_discoveries.boundary: Multiplicative replacement works when near-zeros are real presences (Nuclear at 0.1% = real reactors). Bayesian replacement works when zeros are essential (no geothermal geology). MC-4 specifies WHEN to use WHICH, not which is 'better'.

eight_discoveries.finding: The perturbation direction is universal across all IAMs
eight_discoveries.evidence: Same sign pattern across GCAM, MESSAGEix, REMIND: Coal(−−), Gas(−), Oil(−−), Nuclear(±), Hydro(~0), Solar(++), Wind(++), Biomass(~0), Geothermal(+).
eight_discoveries.implication: All IAMs agree on WHERE the simplex is going. They disagree only on HOW FAST. Net Zero: 0.12/yr annual perturbation rate. Current Policies: 0.04/yr.
eight_discoveries.who_benefits: Model intercomparison projects — the direction is consensus; focus debate on speed. Policymakers — the compositional destination is not in dispute.

complementary_integration.principle: HUF diagnoses, it does not optimize. It tells you what the composition is doing. It does not tell you what to do about it. We are the stethoscope, not the surgeon.

integrations.their_problem: Ensemble means in absolute units violate simplex constraint
integrations.huf_offers: Compositional averaging via Fréchet mean in ILR space. Subcompositional coherence test before publishing.
integrations.their_data_helps_us: Their multi-model outputs ARE the test bed for HUF diagnostics
integrations.boundary: We don't tell them to stop averaging. We show them how to average correctly.

integrations.their_problem: Parts treated as independent; simplex constraint ignored
integrations.huf_offers: Variation matrix identifies which parts CAN be treated independently and which must be coupled. Principled dimensionality reduction.
integrations.their_data_helps_us: Their scenario outputs are the compositions HUF monitors. More scenarios = better diagnostics.
integrations.boundary: We complement their optimization. They find the path; we diagnose its quality.

integrations.huf_offers: Structural diagnosis of starting position. Which transitions the current composition actually supports.
integrations.their_data_helps_us: Policy scenario definitions = powering exponents in perturbation analysis
integrations.boundary: Structure constrains; policy operates within constraints. Both matter. r=0.93 means structure explains 93% of VARIANCE, not that policy explains 0%.

integrations.huf_offers: Sensitivity protocol: test multiplicative AND Bayesian at multiple α, report range. Let domain science choose.
integrations.their_data_helps_us: Their replacement methods handle essential zeros that multiplicative cannot
integrations.boundary: Both methods survive in MC-4. Domain determines protocol. Nuclear at 0.1% = multiplicative. No-geothermal country = Bayesian.

integrations.their_problem: Reversal scenarios lack compositional path quality metrics
integrations.huf_offers: Time-reversal diagnostic: compare forward vs backward governance efficiency. Quantified path dependency.
integrations.their_data_helps_us: Reversal scenarios are the strongest test cases for HUF irreversibility detection
integrations.boundary: Compositional irreversibility ≠ physical impossibility. It means the return path costs more (higher CV, more winding).

integrations.their_problem: Systems analysis lacks compositional monitoring layer
integrations.huf_offers: MC-4 diagnostic layer on top of MESSAGEix/GLOBIOM outputs. EITT as temporal robustness test. Governance efficiency as scenario quality metric.
integrations.their_data_helps_us: Their data store is vast and open. Every dataset with parts-of-a-whole is a HUF target.
integrations.boundary: HUF does not replace MESSAGEix. It monitors what MESSAGEix produces. Open-loop diagnosis on closed-loop optimization.

iiasa_entry_points.strategy_alignment: IIASA's strategy calls for 'new systems tools that increase realism'. CoDa/HUF is exactly this — a diagnostic layer that reveals compositional structure invisible in absolute units.

programs.ASA_NODES: Novel Data Ecosystems — HUF adds compositional diagnostics to any dataset with parts-of-a-whole
programs.ASA_SYRR: Systemic Risk and Resilience — governance efficiency, winding ratio, and irreversibility are risk metrics
programs.ECE: Energy, Climate, Environment — first deployment domain (already demonstrated on NGFS Phase 4)
programs.CAT: Cooperation and Transformative Governance — the governance efficiency concept maps directly

iiasa_entry_points.timeline: CoDaWork Coimbra (May 12-16) → MESSAGE Community Meeting Laxenburg (May 27) → IIASA YSSP or direct partnership proposal

files_produced.name: CoDa_Full_Arsenal_NGFS.xlsx
files_produced.content: 4 sheets: Variation Matrix, Compositional PCA, Balances, 8 Discoveries

files_produced.name: huf_ngfs_results.json
files_produced.content: Full world-level HUF diagnostics with chi timeseries

review_requests: Evaluate whether the 8 discoveries hold up under your independent assessment of the NGFS data structure
Check the complementary integration framing — is it sufficiently collaborative? Does any group have legitimate reason to feel attacked?
Assess whether the perturbation universality (Finding #8) is genuinely structural or an artifact of shared input assumptions across IAMs
Determine whether huf_spec needs v2.1 to incorporate IIASA validation results and the complementary integration framework
The time-reversal irreversibility finding (−0.89 correlation) — does this connect to your spectral independence work? Is there a frequency-domain interpretation of compositional irreversibility?
The Solar↔Wind var=0.154 result — does this tight coupling persist at higher temporal resolution (monthly/daily vs 5-year)?

Subcompositional coherence test showed GCAM is incoherent (fossil↔full r=0.52). Does this relate to the Čencov uniqueness argument you proved for chemistry? Is there a metric-compatibility condition for model intercomparison?
EITT confirmation on IIASA data — does the block-8 marginal drift (5-9%) for fast transitions suggest a scale-dependent correction term?
The zero-replacement sensitivity (54% GovEff change) — can your experimental framework design a protocol to determine the correct α for a given domain?
The variation matrix total variation = 7.00 — is this close to the theoretical maximum for D=9? What does the distance from maximum tell us?

nine_paths.note: Eight paths from S017 + one new path from S018

new_path.what_opens: CoDa/HUF as diagnostic layer for IIASA's modelling ecosystem. Compositional monitoring on MESSAGEix, GLOBIOM, GAINS outputs.
new_path.requires: NGFS data access (demonstrated), MESSAGE Community engagement, YSSP or partnership pathway
new_path.status: VALIDATED — 8 methods applied, 8 discoveries, 257 analyses complete. Timeline: CoDaWork → MESSAGE Meeting → IIASA partnership.

peter_quote: If we crack this nut, we make all things join, we make the data tell us our future based on reality discovered.
